project_type: Next.js 14 static export dashboard + Azure Functions API
test_framework: Vitest with @testing-library/react, jsdom environment, setup file vitest.setup.ts
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm test:ci to verify all tests pass. 2. Run pnpm build to verify static export succeeds with all 17 routes.
environment_constraints: Static export (output: 'export') - no server-side features. No real Azure infrastructure available. All features must degrade gracefully when env vars are not set.
contribution_requirements: Keep all existing functionality working. Data values (kecamatan names, UMKM names) stay in Indonesian regardless of language setting.
key_patterns: Context providers in lib/ (theme-context.tsx, toast-context.tsx) follow same pattern: createContext, Provider component with localStorage persistence, useXxx hook. Components use 'use client' directive. Sidebar in components/dashboard/Sidebar.tsx. Landing sections in components/landing/. Tests in __tests__/lib/ and __tests__/components/ with describe/it blocks.
directory_structure: frontend/app/(landing)/ - landing page, frontend/app/(dashboard)/ - dashboard routes (overview, credit-scoring, portfolio-analytics, location-intelligence, umkm, clustering, policy-simulation, reports, settings, kecamatan), frontend/app/(auth)/ - login/register pages, frontend/lib/ - utilities and context providers, frontend/components/ - reusable components (dashboard/, landing/, chat/, ui/), docs/ - documentation, api/ - Azure Functions
